# If I were to start again...

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2024-10-26 13:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 254

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

If you were to build a website from scratch today, how
differently would you start again?

Well, I can't speak for others, but over the years, I’ve learned
a lot of lessons that I wish I’d known when I first started.

Thanks to all the lessons I have learned so far, whenever I
launch a site, I now follow some checklists to ensure everything
is lined up perfectly: Checklist 1 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..uhD6FmMlA3Lli2zMHpa6Cex7pXrT3IqTK-sER6YNF-k )
 and Checklist 2 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..nag4x1l8tDeB9HihSspCoy9X0etzY4BBBeHFSgXTt4Q )
!

Having the right checklists helps you ensure that you follow best
practices and pay attention to small yet important details.

Even if you aren’t planning to build a new site, it’s worth
taking a look at the above articles.

Let me know what else you’d add to the above checklist by
replying to this email :)

*******************************
What Pros Use on Their Websites
*******************************

Lots of users think that WordPress experts rely heavily on custom
code for their sites. In my experience, that’s not the case.

Professional WordPress developers prefer to use existing tools
rather than reinvent the wheel. Most have a WordPress toolkit — a
collection of software and plugins — that they use to build a
solid foundation for their websites.

The Ultimate WordPress Toolkit for Pros (59+ Must-Have Tools) 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.o3wVhf0jzdsYXnrVGH8edlxFu40nsw2cILD_JD4OVno )

*************************************
Starting a Website? Here’s a Shortcut
*************************************

Have you ever built a WordPress site on your own, only to find it
lacks a professional touch?

While WordPress lets you build your projects on your own, making
the site look both unique and stunning can be tedious.

This is why I started offering WordPress website design services
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..FyAPlUKJ2fIBPDcxkKmKmZONK61Y7uLc44CTsNtwVwc )
on WPBeginner.

The best part is that you can find services that fit your budget!

Have a great rest of your week :)

Cheers,
